title: Evangelion smartphone in the works
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion smartphone in the works             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 13, 2015 4:18 pm Interesting: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Jul 13, 2015 4:43 pm ^ interesting, the last time this happened, they were tie-ins for the movies.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Mon Jul 13, 2015 10:02 pm ^ How so? Is there another thread you could direct me too?

[]:             Quote Post by cody727kirby » Tue Jul 14, 2015 10:40 am Sicarius VI wrote: ^ How so? Is there another thread you could direct me too?

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Jul 14, 2015 3:34 pm ^ Thanks, and the 3.0 one looked pretty cool. However from the trailer this one looks like it's a tie in to the Blu-Ray. So we shall see.

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Mon Jul 20, 2015 8:12 am I was very disappointed on the 3.0 phone not making a movie presence, unlike the 2.0 phone which did.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Mon Jul 20, 2015 2:39 pm Sicarius VI wrote: ^ Thanks, and the 3.0 one looked pretty cool. However from the trailer this one looks like it's a tie in to the Blu-Ray. So we shall see.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Jul 20, 2015 2:49 pm Or they simply don't want to show BD footage because it's likely to be grainy and not really appeal to the modern audience.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Jul 21, 2015 6:39 am Adaminator1 wrote: It's weird it uses footage purely from the Rebuilds, then.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Thu Jul 23, 2015 3:41 pm Sicarius VI wrote: Also you clearly didn't watch the entire trailer to the end.
